Mampujan.synopsisDescription: Year 2000. A peasant town in the mountains in Colombia is accused of collaborating with a guerrilla group. Paramilitaries carry out massacres and cause a massive displacement of hundreds of families. A group of women called “Weavers of Mampujan” makes tapestries for trauma therapy, memory reconstruction, and commitment to peace.
Mampujan.directorsStatementDescription:
Do we need to show more images of horror?

Is there any possibility of remaining sensitive after being bombarded with all that violence in so many ways?



I prefer to believe tenderness is a powerful strength and that we become better people by looking lovingly at reparation acts.

Mampuján was the scenario of the confrontation between the guerrilla and paramilitary forces. 245 families were brought under violence and expelled overnight. Years passed before they returned home.

Cutting, crying, sewing, and telling, were the way the Weavers of Mampuján were able to get over those awful experiences. Their tapestries are the evidence of what they lived through and survived.

This short film is a recreation of the original tapestries. The same way tales pass from mouth to mouth we retell them photo by photo and frame by frame, hoping we will be able to embroider a world worth living in.

Isabel Macias

Memory.description:
When it comes to memory, what hurts is that which finds no place in the weave. What can’t be mended and remains as a frayed hole.

Again and again we settle a hand on the painful spot, as dogs lick their wounds.

Sometimes we can darn it. And the tongue that licked now begins to speak.

SanQuirino.acrossTheDocksDetail: “Across The Docks” is a stop motion soap opera which/that shows the romantic reunion between Pablo and Emilia after being separated for 15 years; while a Multinational Real Estate Company threatens to damage their ecosystem balance. The story is placed between Tigre and Puerto Madero, the main stages are the water streams and their margins.These short episodes show the romantic drama woven with the police plot. It begins when Pablo returns to Tigre Islands to attend his father's funeral. The moment Pablo meets Emilia she seems not to feel hard feelings for his previous leaving even after losing her parents in a confused event but she doesn't either want any romantic bond beyond casual sex.
SanQuirino.theApprenticesDetail: The tiny acrobats enter our world and find real-scale ingredients and enormous cooking utensils. The challenge is to use their circus skills and sense of humour to feed themselves while looking for the best way to light a fire and handle, manipulate and prepare the fruits, seeds and vegetables.
